seoDescription: Learn how Aivora handles and protects your personal and business data.
keywords: Aivora privacy policy, data privacy, confidentiality agreement
headline: PRIVACY POLICY
intro: At Aivora, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the security measures we have in place to protect your business and personal data.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us through our project discovery intake forms, email correspondence, or chat assistant interaction. This includes your name, company details, email address, phone number, and any project-specific details.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information to evaluate and respond to project requests, communicate technical proposals, provide our engineering services, and maintain our client relationships. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Security and Confidentiality
sections.content: We implement robust security practices to protect your data from unauthorized access or alteration. All client information and project requirements are treated as strictly confidential under default non-disclosure standards.
